attributes.description: Alerts when `storage_wal_writes_err` increases. WAL write failures risk data loss on restart.
attributes.name: [InfluxDB OTel] WAL write errors

investigation_guide.blob:
## InfluxDB WAL write errors

### What fired
`storage_wal_writes_err` increased during the window.

### Why it matters
WAL write errors mean crash recovery would not replay all writes. A serious durability signal.

### Triage
1. Check disk health and space.
2. Inspect disk I/O errors in dmesg / cloud provider logs.

### Remediation
- Repair or replace the underlying disk.

### Tuning
- Fires on any increase.
